title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, whatcha doing?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You gotta watch yourself in the middle of the night!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The bastard's still sleeping ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pops really tosses and turns in his sleep.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And his crew just keep drinking and chatting after that...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're clearly underesti- mating me, but even so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just tried to take their captain's head...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't make sense for them to ignore that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Attacking at night, are we?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No matter your methods, you're far...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: from being able to take out pops.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In every pirate crew, the captain is the boss.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But since I got here, I've only heard you call him one thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Pops.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're a weird pirate crew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...you... know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey, you can't even stand!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to the sick bay. Come, I'll take you there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Leave me alone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: i wont accept charity from the enemy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Really? Then what did you do with the food we let you sneak out for dinner?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Uh-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, that's right, you were always flicking through medical books.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're really just here because you're into that Leopard print, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm here to work, you idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If some- one gives you food and a place to stay,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You pay them back! That's the pirates' code of honor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Meh ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I feel awful...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys are all being put to work 'cuz of me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, we're the ones who lost!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though you gave us an escape, we still got caught...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'M THE ONE WHO LOST!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm your captain. That's why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I need to take out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: White- Beard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Bur- Dening your- Self Like That...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ACE, you ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he's really gonna keep me on this ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...then I'll make full use...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...of the opportu- Nity!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Come then, waste your time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll make you re- gret...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...keep. ing me on this ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: fire fight!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
